use_cases: Triggering form submissions with primary or secondary action styles
Navigation links styled as buttons with ghost or link variants
Destructive actions using the destructive variant with red styling
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces using the icon size variant
Polymorphic button rendering via asChild prop for flexible composition
ai_summary: A versatile button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, featuring 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Supports polymorphic rendering via asChild prop and includes focus-visible accessibility states. Shadow effects add subtle depth while maintaining a clean, flat aesthetic suitable for any modern web application.
